nasb.text: He made four pillars of acacia for it, and overlaid them with gold, with their hooks of gold; and he cast four sockets of silver for them.

esv.text: And for it he made four pillars of acacia and overlaid them with gold. Their hooks were of gold, and he cast for them four bases of silver.

cnv.text: 他替幔幕做了四根皂莢木柱子，用金子包裹，柱釘是金的，又替柱子鑄造四個銀座。

ccb.text: 把这幅幔子挂在四根用皂荚木造的柱子上，柱子外面包上金，加上金钩，四根柱子下面有四个银底座。
